title: rorippa fluviatilis
intro: Rorippa fluviatilis, also known as watercress, is a type of aquatic plant that belongs to the Brassicaceae family. It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of watercress include reducing the risk of heart disease, cancer, and cognitive decline, as well as improving eye health and digestion. Watercress can be consumed fresh in salads or prepared into herbal teas, capsules, and juices for its medicinal and health benefits.
